title: Throttle body removal
dgName: Cars not equipped with a turbo charger

items: Do not place fingers inside the throttle body when the ignition is turned to the ON mode or while the ignition is in the ON mode. If the throttle valve should actuate, it could pinch your fingers and cause serious injury.

items.text: When replacing the throttle body, perform all steps.
When replacing the throttle body, perform all steps.
If you are only removing and installing the throttle body, perform steps 3 and 4 only.
If you are only removing and installing the throttle body, perform steps 3 and 4 only.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.

In HDS, select the DBW test in the Inspection menu, then select Clear Throttle Valve Correction Value to clear the carbon deposit correction value. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode. Turn ignition to ON mode and wait for 2 seconds. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode.

items: Do not step on the accelerator pedal at this time.

blocks.text: Remove the air intake tube (A). Disconnect the coupler (B). Remove the throttle body (C) from the intake manifold (D).

items: Do not place fingers inside the throttle body when the ignition is turned to the ON mode or while the ignition is in the ON mode. If the throttle valve should actuate, it could pinch your fingers and cause serious injury.

blocks.text: Install the throttle body (A) onto the intake manifold (B). Tighten the bolt (D) in the following three steps. Connect the coupler (E). Install the air intake tube (F).

items: Gasket (C) shall be replaced upon disassembly.

items.text: Tighten until the bolt seats on the throttle body.
Tighten until the bolt seats on the throttle body.
Tighten until throttle body and intake manifold are completely tight.
Tighten until throttle body and intake manifold are completely tight.

items: When replenishing cooling water, do not allow the cooling water to adhere to electrical components or painted surfaces. If it does adhere, wipe it off immediately.
